prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `278e5215`.
codex_response:
Implemented `278e5215` in [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_278e5215/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_278e5215/verifier.py#L4), and [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_278e5215/generator.py#L17). The rule is: crop the connected `5` mask and the separate `3 x w` color strip, repeat the strip’s first row over the mask height, and fill the mask holes with the uniform color from the strip’s last row.

I treated the summary hints as rough starts but corrected them; [notes.md](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_278e5215/notes.md#L1) records that the hinted “cyclic upper-row” reading is broader than what the official family actually shows. The generator matches the official family by sampling exactly two vertically separated nonzero components: a duplicated-top-row template strip plus a connected medium-density holed `5` mask. No new shared primitive was needed.

Verification:
- `conda run --no-capture-output -n arc python -m arc2.shared.verify --task 278e5215` passed `4/4`.
- `conda run --no-capture-output -n arc python -m arc2.shared.build --task 278e5215 --n-examples 1000` produced [task.json](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/278e5215/task.json), [originals.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/278e5215/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/278e5215/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/278e5215/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/278e5215/previews/preview_03.png).
- `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task 278e5215` passed `1000/1000`.
